target.name: compileJava
target.depends: java.compile.testAnnotatedType, java.compile.testOverridingType, java.compile.testOverridingRule, java.compile.testWrappedType, java.compile.testPrimitiveType, java.compile.testSubtypingA, java.compile.testSubtypingB, java.compile.jetbrains.mps.lang.typesystem.test, java.compile.testSubstituteType, java.compile.testSubtypingTest
